news.headline: BrainCo showcased noninvasive brain-computer tech at 136th Canton Fair, impacting lives with innovation.
news.summary: In Guangzhou, China, on October 23, 2024, the 136th Canton Fair featured BrainCo, a leading innovator in brain-computer technology solutions. This marked the company's second presence at the event, where they showcased cutting-edge noninvasive brain-computer technology solutions. These advancements are transforming various industries.

news.headline: ATS Technic and Proponent partner in strengthning global MRO supply chain solutions, marking a significant step for both companies.
news.summary: In Barcelona, Spain, on October 23, 2024, ATS Technic, the inaugural EASA-certified line maintenance and logistics provider in the UAE, partnered with Proponent, the leading independent aircraft parts distributor. The collaboration involves a Memorandum of Understanding that signifies a significant milestone in the aviation industry. ATS Technic specializes in servicing a wide range of aircraft models, ensuring top-notch maintenance and logistical support. Proponent, on the other hand, is renowned for its extensive distribution network and quality aircraft parts. The agreement is set to boost efficiency and reliability in aircraft maintenance and parts procurement, catering to the growing demand in the aviation sector. This strategic partnership aims to capitalize on the expertise of ATS Technic and the vast reach of Proponent to enhance services and expand market presence.

news.headline: 347,000 cars flood-damaged in 2024 hurricanes, with 120,000 in Florida. Scammers reselling damaged vehicles rising.
news.summary: The recent storms have provided scammers with the opportunity to illegally resell damaged vehicles. According to CARFAX estimates, a staggering 347,000 vehicles have been affected by flood damage during the 2024 hurricane season. Hurricane Milton alone contributed to around 120,000 of these vehicles in Florida. This alarming trend highlights the need for consumers to be cautious when purchasing used vehicles, as there is a high likelihood of encountering flood-damaged cars in the market.

news.headline: Amsted Automotive introduces multi-speed shift tech to boost efficiency in EVs and HEVs for enhanced performance.
news.summary: The advancement of electric vehicle (EV) and hybrid electric vehicle (HEV) propulsion systems is crucial to enhance efficiency and increase the all-electric driving range, alongside improving performance and cargo-carrying capacity. Amsted Automotive's innovative multi-functional clutch technology plays a key role in enabling multi-speed shift systems to meet these demanding objectives. This development aims to address the need for improved efficiency and range in the next generation of electric vehicles.

news.headline: Softstar Shoes unveils anatomically shaped Primal Chelsea Boots for wide feet, easing shoe shopping frustration.
news.summary: Softstar Shoes has launched the innovative Primal Chelsea Boots that feature an anatomically shaped design. The new boots aim to address the common issue faced by individuals with wide feet when trying to find comfortable footwear. Launched in Philomath, Oregon on October 23, 2024, these boots offer a solution for those struggling to find shoes that fit well. This product caters specifically to individuals with wider feet, providing relief from the usual challenges encountered when shopping for suitable footwear. With the introduction of Primal Chelsea Boots, Softstar Shoes seeks to offer a comfortable and stylish option for customers, enhancing their overall experience.

news.headline: Travelzoo's Q3 2024 revenue fell 2% YoY to $20.1M, with $4.9M non-GAAP operating profit and $5.3M cash flow. EPS=$0.
news.summary: In a recent report, Travelzoo® (NASDAQ: TZOO) announced a revenue of $20.1 million, reflecting a 2% decrease compared to the previous year. The company reported a consolidated operating profit of $4.0 million and a non-GAAP consolidated operating profit of $4.9 million. Additionally, Travelzoo® disclosed a cash flow from operations of $5.3 million. The earnings per share (EPS) stood at $0. Information on the performance of the company was released without specifying the source.

news.headline: Boeing reports $6B loss before crucial vote amid worker strike.
Phonism of Tampa, Fla., introduces Inlayer for advanced network device management through AI and automation.
news.summary: In Tampa, Florida, on October 23, 2024, Phonism, a prominent company in telecom device management, has unveiled the introduction of Inlayer. This new organization is dedicated to creating a comprehensive network device management platform that utilizes AI and automation technology. The innovative platform aims to streamline the management of telecom devices for businesses, offering advanced solutions for improved efficiency. Phonism's Inlayer represents a significant step towards revolutionizing device management in the industry.

news.headline: Dwolla partners with Plaid for future-proof bank payments, offering instant verification and risk assessment.
news.summary: Dwolla, a prominent account-to-account payment solution provider based in the U.S., has enhanced its unified platform by integrating pre-integration. This integration, revealed on October 23, 2024, in Des Moines, Iowa, enables instant account verification and risk assessment to offer more efficient services. The move aims to strengthen Dwolla's A2A payment solution by streamlining processes and ensuring enhanced security measures for its users.

news.headline: Law firm investigating federal securities violations by SIGA Technologies (NASDAQ: SIGA) on behalf of purchasers.
news.summary: Investigation into potential securities claims on behalf of purchasers of SIGA Technologies, Inc. (NASDAQ: SIGA) is being conducted by Wolf Haldenstein Adler Freeman & Herz LLP. The national shareholder rights litigation firm based in New York has taken on the case. SIGA Technologies, Inc. stockholders are under scrutiny as Wolf Haldenstein investigates potential legal action related to securities claims. The investigation was announced on October 23, 2024.

news.headline: Data breach at TransUnion Risk and Alternative Data Solutions, Inc. being investigated by law firm Wolf Haldenstein Adler Freeman & Herz LLP. New York and Chicago, Oct. 23, 2024.
news.summary: A well-known consumer rights law firm, Wolf Haldenstein Adler Freeman & Herz LLP, based in New York and Chicago, has embarked on an investigation into claims surrounding the recent data breach at TransUnion Risk and Alternative Data Solutions, Inc. (TRADS). The breach has led to concerns for individuals impacted by the incident. This breach has affected a substantial number of consumers, raising issues regarding data security and privacy. Wolf Haldenstein Adler Freeman & Herz LLP aims to address the grievances of those affected by this breach through their investigation.

news.headline: Law firm Wolf Haldenstein is investigating Joint Stock Company Kaspi.kz AO for potential violations of securities laws.
news.summary: On October 23, 2024, Wolf Haldenstein Adler Freeman & Herz LLP (Wolf Haldenstein), a leading shareholder rights litigation firm, disclosed they are looking into possible securities claims for individuals who bought American Depositary Shares. The investigation aims to represent purchasers affected by the situation.

news.headline: IBM will release Q3 earnings with expected $2.23/share, revenue of $15.07 billion, and 2.88% dividend yield.
news.summary: Tech giant IBM will be announcing its third-quarter earnings after markets close on Wednesday. Analysts are predicting earnings of $2.23 per share, a bump from $2.01 per share last year. Revenue for the quarter is estimated at $15.07 billion, up from $13.42 billion a year before. IBM unveiled its latest AI model, Granite 3.0, at the annual TechXchange event. Investors are also eyeing IBM's dividends, with the company offering an annual yield of 2.88%. More details can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Blue Foundry Bancorp reported a net loss of $4.0 million for Q3 2024, compared to $2.3 million in Q2 2024 and $1.4 million in Q3 2023.
news.summary: In Rutherford, New Jersey, Blue Foundry Bancorp (NASDAQ:BLFY) disclosed a net loss of $4.0 million, indicating a loss of $0.19 per diluted common share for the quarter ending on September 30, 2024. This contrasts with the previous quarter ending June 30, 2024, which reported a net loss of $2.3 million, equivalent to $0.11 per diluted common share. Similarly, the net loss for the quarter ending September 30, 2023, was $1.4 million, correlating to $0.06 per diluted common share.

news.headline: Ashling Partners wins UiPath 2024 Partner of the Year Award at UiPath FORWARD conference in Las Vegas.
news.summary: In Chicago on October 23, 2024, Ashling Partners was awarded the title of UiPath 2024 Partner of the Year during the UiPath FORWARD conference in Las Vegas. This accolade is given to partners who show exceptional dedication in assisting companies in integrating AI technologies.

news.headline: Bob Evans launches new Queso Macaroni & Cheese - a twist on America's No.1 refrigerated mac & cheese.
news.summary: A new version of America's top refrigerated macaroni & cheese is currently on shelves. Bob Evans® fans can indulge in a modern twist on the classic favorite with the introduction of Bob Evans Queso Macaroni & Cheese. This new product was designed to cater to the increasing demand for innovative flavors in the market. Available since October 23, 2024, in stores nationwide, this fresh take aims to captivate consumers looking for a fresh and exciting dining experience. Don't miss out on trying this new twist on a beloved dish!

news.headline: IRSA filed 20-F Form for FY 2024 ending June 30, 2024 with SEC, company leading real estate in Argentina.
news.summary: In Buenos Aires, Argentina on October 23, 2024, IRSA Inversiones y Representaciones S.A. (NYSE: IRS; ByMA: IRSA), the top real estate firm in the country, disclosed the submission of its 20-F Form to the SEC for the Fiscal Year 2024 concluding on June 30, 2024.

news.headline: 1NCE, fast-growing IoT company, wins "Automotive Sensor Software Solution of the Year" at AutoTech Breakthrough Awards.
news.summary: 1NCE, a rapidly expanding IoT company, was honored with the "Automotive Sensor Software Solution of the Year" award at the prestigious AutoTech Breakthrough Awards ceremony. The event took place in Cologne, Germany, and Miami.

news.headline: Piana Sleep partners with Reveille Hospitality to introduce eco-luxurious Rinnovo Mattress to upscale hotels, Oct. 23, 2024.
news.summary: Two leading companies, Reveille Hospitality and Piana Sleep, based out of Cartersville, Ga., are teaming up with a focus on innovation and sustainability. Piana Sleep, a branch of Piana Technology, aims to revolutionize the mattress industry. The partnership, announced on Oct. 23, 2024, is set to make waves in the industry.

news.headline: Schweiger Dermatology Group acquires ClearlyDerm in Florida, adding 5 new offices; founded by Dr. Andrea Colton.
news.summary: In Boca Raton, Florida, on October 23, 2024, Schweiger Dermatology Group announced their expansion in Florida through the acquisition of ClearlyDerm. Dr. Andrea Colton, founder of ClearlyDerm, led this leading dermatology practice in South Florida. This acquisition is a substantial move for Schweiger Dermatology Group as they aim to bolster their presence in the region.

news.headline: Global PET bottles market projected to reach USD 35.7 billion by 2032, growing at CAGR of 3.3%. Key drivers include efficient logistics, innovative packaging, consumer preferences, and eco-friendly trends..closePath
news.summary: The global PET bottles market is projected to grow at a CAGR of 3.3% from 2024 to 2032, with an estimated sales revenue of US$35.7 billion by 2032. Factors contributing to this growth include streamlined supply chains, effective branding and marketing strategies, and tailored product offerings based on consumer preferences. The introduction of unique features like tamper-evident seals and ergonomic designs adds value to PET bottles, particularly in niche markets such as pharmaceuticals and specialty beverages. Key findings of the market report include the 500 ml to 1000 ml capacity segment leading the market, the PCO/BPF neck type segment dominating, and beverages driving demand. Growth drivers and trends in the market include the increasing demand for eco-friendly PET bottles, consumer preference for lightweight and shatter-resistant packaging, and continuous innovations in manufacturing processes.

news.headline: Coca-Cola exceeds profit expectations with higher prices, despite unexpected decrease in volume.
L.A. Works hosts roundtable with AJ Pearlman, Director of Public Health AmeriCorps in Los Angeles, Oct. 23, 2024
news.summary: On October 23, 2024, in Los Angeles, L.A. Works, the city's leading nonprofit focused on utilizing volunteer support, organized a roundtable event with AJ Pearlman, the Director of Public Health AmeriCorps, and a team of committed public health AmeriCorps members. This event gathered [specific number] individuals [mention any specific focus of discussion or notable points].

news.headline: Arlington Memorial Park in Sandy Springs, GA opens nation's first two-story mausoleum to cater to the cremation interment trend.
news.summary: A new custom-designed two-story mausoleum has recently opened at Arlington Memorial Park in Sandy Springs, Georgia. The mausoleum is part of the Dignity Memorial® property and caters to the increasing trend of cremation interments. This marks a significant addition to Metro Atlanta and provides a unique option for honoring loved ones. The new facility is the latest development in the area and showcases the growing preference for cremation, with numbers suggesting a rise in cremation interments.

news.headline: AT&T reports Q3 earnings: $30.21B revenues, 403k postpaid phone adds, $4.4B impairment charge, beats EPS estimate.
news.summary: AT&T Inc (NYSE:T) announced their third-quarter 2024 operating revenues at $30.21 billion, revealing a 0.5% decrease compared to the previous year, slightly below the analyst consensus of $30.44 billion. The slowdown in smartphone purchases was identified as a key factor affecting the overall performance, according to Bloomberg. Surpassing expectations, the adjusted EPS stood at $0.60, outperforming the estimated $0.57. Following the disclosure, the company's stock witnessed an increase. In terms of subscriber numbers, AT&T acquired 403,000 postpaid phone net adds, surpassing the anticipated 394.6 thousand. Within the Mobility segment, the company added 617 thousand wireless net subscribers, which included 429 thousand postpaid phone net adds. The postpaid churn rate in AT&T's mobility segment was noted at 0.93%, slightly lower compared to the previous period. For a more detailed analysis, the complete article can be accessed on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: EU sends financial aid to Slovakia following dispute over legislative modifications, without revealing the amount.
ECB's Holzmann: The current data doesn't justify 50 bps in December.
VERANÓ Hotels + Resorts appoints Pierre-Alex Maillard as Area General Manager for Puerto Rico, effective Oct. 23, 2024.
news.summary: Renowned luxury hospitality expert, Pierre-Alex Maillard, has been appointed as the Area General Manager at VERANÓ Hotels + Resorts in San Juan, Puerto Rico. This prestigious property is the first in Puerto Rico to be recognized as a Leading Hotels of the World® property. The announcement was made on October 23, 2024. In his new role, Pierre-Alex will oversee operations and lead the team at this exclusive property known for its top-notch services and amenities.

news.headline: 350 golfers in Houston raise over $1,000,000 for Muscular Dystrophy Association, a record-breaking amount for the event.
news.summary: In Houston on October 23, 2024, around 350 golfers convened to participate in a charity event aiming to raise funds for the Muscular Dystrophy Association (MDA). The event proved to be a huge success, as it amassed over $1,000,000 in donations, setting a new fundraising milestone. This achievement solidified it as the highest-earning event of its kind to date. Additionally, various MDA initiatives sponsored by CITGO throughout the year, such as those linked to refinery efforts, also contributed towards supporting this cause.

news.headline: Integral Molecular gets $8M NIAID contract to fight emerging viruses, marking a five-year collaboration.
news.summary: Integral Molecular, a prominent company specializing in cutting-edge technologies for vaccine and therapeutic discovery, has recently received a substantial five-year contract worth $8 million from the National Institute of Allergy and Infectious Diseases, a branch of the National Institutes of Health. This funding marks a significant milestone for the company and will help propel their innovative research efforts in the coming years.

news.headline: TELA Bio prices public offering at $2.25/share, includes 12M common stock and 5.8M pre-funded warrants, raising $40M.
news.summary: TELA Bio, Inc. announced a public offering of 12,000,000 shares of common stock at $2.25 per share, along with pre-funded warrants to purchase 5,800,000 shares at $2.2499 per warrant. This totals $40 million in gross proceeds before expenses. Underwriters have an option to buy an additional 2,670,000 shares. The offering is set to close around October 24, 2024.

news.headline: Conga launches Conga Advantage Platform, world's first open Revenue Lifecycle Management platform.
news.summary: Conga, based in Broomfield, Colorado, has unveiled the complete Conga Revenue Lifecycle Management (RLM) platform, known as the Conga Advantage Platform, which is now readily accessible for users.

news.headline: ATCC receives NIH grant to build biomanufacturing suite at Manassas HQ, enhancing operations.
news.summary: A grant has been awarded to ATCC by NIH for the construction of a new biomanufacturing facility located at the company's headquarters in Manassas, Virginia. The facility is expected to support advanced research and development efforts in biomanufacturing, enhancing capabilities in this field. This investment underscores the importance of ATCC's role in the industry and signifies a significant step forward in boosting biomanufacturing capacity in the region.

news.headline: Flosonics Medical wins Best In Class Digital Health Award for world's first wearable Doppler Ultrasound Patch at HLTH.
news.summary: In Las Vegas, Flosonics Medical, a prominent figure in wearable medical ultrasound technology, was recognized as a Best in Class recipient at the Digital Health Awards. The ceremony took place during the HLTH global healthcare conference, hosted by the Digital Health Hub Foundation. Following their previous title as a Rising Star in the awards, Flosonics achieved the prestigious title of Best in Class in the Provider Diagnostics segment. Their innovation, FloPatch®, which is known as the world's first wireless and wearable Doppler device, garnered significant attention. This recognition comes exactly a year after their initial win, solidifying their position in the industry.

news.headline: ECB's Holzmann: Market pricing of cuts is likely too aggressive.
ECB's Holzmann: Some colleagues are likely to push for a big December cut.
LG adds local stations to free streaming channel lineup with launch of "News Hub" on LG Channels featuring weather reports and news from ABC News Live, CNN Headlines, LiveNOW.
news.summary: In Englewood Cliffs, New Jersey on October 23, 2024, LG Electronics USA unveiled its new "News Hub" on LG Channels. This feature allows users to access weather updates, as well as local and national news broadcasts from popular stations such as ABC News Live, CNN Headlines, and LiveNOW.

news.headline: ORFLO Technologies relocates headquarters from Idaho to California after 15 years, settles in El Cajon, San Diego. Founded in 2010.
news.summary: On October 23, 2024, ORFLO Technologies, LLC revealed its headquarters relocation to El Cajon, California, within the greater San Diego region. Established in 2010, the company had been based in Ketchum, Idaho, for around 15 years. This move marks a significant shift in the company's operations and strategic focus.

news.headline: Avantor and NIBRT partner to provide Masterflex equipment, products, training for biopharma industry. NYSE: AVTR.
news.summary: Avantor, a prominent global supplier, has joined forces with NIBRT. Their collaboration aims to facilitate advancements in biopharma manufacturing through the provision of cutting-edge Masterflex® equipment, necessary products, and specialized training. The partnership was established in October 23, 2024, based in Radnor, Pennsylvania. Avantor, traded on the New York Stock Exchange under the ticker symbol AVTR, is recognized for its commitment to driving innovation in the industry.

news.headline: CRB honors Niranjan Kulkarni, PhD, at ISPE Annual Meeting for his expertise in life sciences.
news.summary: A company based in Kansas City, Missouri, CRB, known for their sustainable engineering, architecture, construction, and consulting services for the life sciences and food and beverage sectors, is recognizing Niranjan Kulkarni, PhD, as their Senior Director of Consulting. This acknowledgment was made public on October 23, 2024.

news.headline: ECB's Holzmann: I'm not sure too much has changed in recent data.
Orban criticizes opposition as his backing decreases in Hungary; latest poll numbers show decline.
ECB's Holzmann: I see a soft landing for Europe as guaranteed.
Scope Technologies introduces subscription model for cloud storage, CSE: SCPE, OTCQB: SCPCF, FSE: VN8, on Oct. 23, 2024.
news.summary: Scope Technologies Corp. has officially introduced its subscription model on October 23, 2024. The company, trading under CSE: SCPE, OTCQB: SCPCF, and FSE: VN8, is now providing full access to individuals and small businesses.

news.headline: 1 in 3 Americans at highest risk for blood vessel diseases, with low awareness. Society launches campaign for vascular health.
news.summary: A recent survey uncovered that approximately 33% of Americans who are at a heightened risk for blood vessel diseases and severe complications lack proper awareness about their condition. In response to this concerning statistic, the Society for Vascular Surgery has initiated the Highway to Health campaign. The aim of this campaign is to assist individuals in safeguarding their vascular health regardless of age. The headquarters of this initiative is in ROSEMONT, Illinois, and the campaign was launched in October.

news.headline: Master & Dynamic partners with Karma Automotive, offering luxury audio brand's first in-cabin audio system. #luxuryauto
news.summary: In Irvine, California on October 23, 2024, Karma Automotive, the state's sole ultra-luxury automaker, revealed a new venture with high-end audio company Master & Dynamic. This collaboration will see Master & Dynamic creating its premier in-cabin sound systems for Karma's vehicles.

news.headline: SK bioscience's quadrivalent influenza vaccine approved in Indonesia, opening doors to market of 273 million people. Aim to expand globally with cell-cultured vaccines.
news.summary: The recent approval granted opens up opportunities for exports to the fourth most populous country globally. SK bioscience, based in Seongnam, South Korea, is positioning itself to expand internationally and become a prominent vaccine brand by capitalizing on the benefits of cell-cultured vaccines. This development presents a significant growth opportunity for SK bioscience as it aims to establish a strong presence in the global market.

news.headline: Frontier Co-op and Whole Foods Market launch exclusive Regenerative Organic Certified® Vanilla Extract and Black Peppercorns available nationwide this holiday season.
news.summary: Frontier Co-op is set to launch their new Regenerative Organic Certified® Indonesian Vanilla Extract and Regenerative Organic Certified® Whole Black Peppercorns at Whole Foods Market across the nation during the upcoming holiday season. The products will be exclusively available at Whole Foods Market. The announcement was made from NORWAY, Iowa on October 23, 2024.

news.headline: Tanya Ragan, Wildcat Management founder, an SME at 2024 CREW Development Competition in Dallas on Oct. 24.
news.summary: On October 23, 2024, Tanya Ragan, a prominent figure in commercial real estate and the creator of Wildcat Management, has been selected to serve as a Subject Matter Expert (SME) for the 2024 CREW Development Competition. This competition is being organized by CREW Dallas and is scheduled for October 24. Ragan's participation highlights her expertise and influence in the real estate sector.

news.headline: Olympus partners with Proximie to offer health tech platform for operating rooms digitization globally on Oct. 23, 2024.
news.summary: A leading health tech platform for digitizing operating rooms is being offered to healthcare customers by Olympus Corporation through a new global partnership with Proximie, a health technology company. This cloud-based solution aims to revolutionize operating rooms worldwide. The collaboration, announced on October 23, 2024 in Center Valley, Pennsylvania, is set to enhance efficiency and patient care. This initiative will benefit hospitals and medical facilities by improving communication and workflow during surgical procedures. This partnership signifies a significant stride in the healthcare industry, with both companies committed to providing cutting-edge solutions.
